================================================================================
GITHUB SECRETS FOR AZURE CONTAINER APPS DEPLOYMENT
================================================================================

Go to: Repository → Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions → New repository secret

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
AZURE INFRASTRUCTURE SECRETS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

AZURE_CREDENTIALS
Value: JSON with service principal credentials
{
  "clientId": "your-service-principal-client-id",
  "clientSecret": "your-service-principal-secret",
  "subscriptionId": "your-subscription-id",
  "tenantId": "your-tenant-id"
}
How to get: az ad sp create-for-rbac --name fabric-pipeline-sp --role contributor \
  --scopes /subscriptions/{subscription-id}/resourceGroups/{resource-group} \
  --sdk-auth

ACR_NAME
Value: your-acr-name (e.g., fabricpipelineacr)
How to get: The name of your Azure Container Registry (create if doesn't exist)

RESOURCE_GROUP
Value: your-resource-group-name (e.g., fabric-pipeline-rg)
How to get: Your Azure resource group name

CONTAINER_ENV_NAME
Value: your-container-env-name (e.g., fabric-pipeline-env)
How to get: Name for Azure Container Apps Environment (will be created if doesn't exist)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
DATABASE SECRETS (from settings.py)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

DATABASE_SERVER
Value: fabric-server.database.windows.net

DATABASE_NAME
Value: fabricdb

DATABASE_USER
Value: fabricadmin

DATABASE_PASSWORD
Value: <your-database-password>

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
AI SERVICE SECRETS (from settings.py)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
Value: sk-ant-api03-...

AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT
Value: https://jayr-mgs8va5p-eastus2.cognitiveservices.azure.com/

AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY
Value: <your-azure-openai-key>

AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT
Value: gpt-5-chat

AZURE_AI_PROJECT_ENDPOINT
Value: https://fabricfoundary.services.ai.azure.com/api/projects/fabricproject

BING_GROUNDING_CONNECTION_ID
Value: /subscriptions/df3a2439-dcb9-4a5e-94f1-dfc7094b7894/resourceGroups/.../connections/fabricbing

BING_SEARCH_API_KEY
Value: c3555303c57d469b9ebcda8ec4654dbe

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
MICROSOFT FABRIC SECRETS (from settings.py)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

FABRIC_CLIENT_ID
Value: 0944e22d-d0f1-40c1-a9fc-f422c05949f3

FABRIC_TENANT_ID
Value: e28d23e3-803d-418d-a720-c0bed39f77b6

FABRIC_CLIENT_SECRET
Value: <your-fabric-client-secret>

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
STORAGE SECRETS (from settings.py)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME
Value: claimsadlsgen2

STORAGE_ACCOUNT_KEY
Value: <your-storage-account-key>

WORKSPACE_BACKEND_URL
Value: https://fabricbackend.lemonfield-12c57489.eastus.azurecontainerapps.io

================================================================================
SETUP CHECKLIST
================================================================================

[ ] 1. Create Azure Service Principal and get AZURE_CREDENTIALS
[ ] 2. Create Azure Resource Group
[ ] 3. Create or identify Azure Container Registry name
[ ] 4. Add all 20+ secrets to GitHub repository
[ ] 5. Ensure service principal has permissions to:
       - Create/manage Container Registry
       - Create/manage Container Apps
       - Push/pull images from ACR
[ ] 6. Update workflow if needed (optional customizations)
[ ] 7. Push to main or dev-jay branch to trigger deployment

================================================================================
CREATE SERVICE PRINCIPAL (for AZURE_CREDENTIALS)
================================================================================

# 1. Login to Azure
az login

# 2. Get your subscription ID
az account show --query id -o tsv

# 3. Create service principal with contributor role
az ad sp create-for-rbac \
  --name fabric-pipeline-sp \
  --role contributor \
  --scopes /subscriptions/{YOUR_SUBSCRIPTION_ID}/resourceGroups/{YOUR_RESOURCE_GROUP} \
  --sdk-auth

# 4. Copy the entire JSON output to AZURE_CREDENTIALS secret

================================================================================
CREATE AZURE CONTAINER REGISTRY (if doesn't exist)
================================================================================

az acr create \
  --name fabricpipelineacr \
  --resource-group fabric-pipeline-rg \
  --sku Basic \
  --location eastus

================================================================================
VERIFY SECRETS
================================================================================

After adding secrets, verify:
1. All secret names match exactly (case-sensitive)
2. No trailing spaces in values
3. AZURE_CREDENTIALS is valid JSON
4. Service principal has necessary permissions
5. ACR name is unique globally (across all Azure)

================================================================================
